Class Scene2

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
component.scene2.Scene2
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class Scene2 extends javafx.scene.layout.Pane
Main battle scene that hosts gameplay, HUD, timer, and end-game presentation.

  • Property Summary

    Constructor
    Description
    Scene2()
    Creates and initializes the battle scene, HUD nodes, players, and input/game loop hooks.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addProjectile(BaseProjectileAttack p)
    Registers and renders a projectile.
    private void
    checkGameOver()
    Checks HP values and triggers game-over flow if either player reaches zero HP.
    private void
    endGameAndShowPopup(int winnerPlayerNumber)
    Convenience overload that builds a winner message from player number.
    private void
    endGameAndShowPopup(String message)
    Stops gameplay loop and displays a centered popup with custom message.

    Formats a second count into MM:SS.
    static Scene2
    getInstance()
    Returns the currently active Scene2 instance.

    handleGameOver(Player winner, Player loser)
    Handles end-of-match state transition and optional loser death animation.
    void
    removeProjectile(BaseProjectileAttack p)
    Removes a projectile from both simulation and scene graph.
    private void
    setImageBackground()
    Applies the scene background image using cover-style sizing.
    private void
    setupControls(javafx.scene.Scene scene)
    Registers keyboard input handlers and forwards events to both player logic controllers.

    Shows a temporary floating label above a target (damage/heal indicator).
    private void
    showVictoryOverlay(Player winner)
    Builds and animates the final victory/draw overlay.
    private void
    startGameLoop()
    Starts the per-frame game loop.

      Top margin used for HUD placement.

      private static final double HEALTH_BAR_SIDE_MARGIN
      Side margin used to anchor HUD elements left and right.

      private static final double SKILL_BAR_VERTICAL_GAP
      Vertical spacing between health and skill bars.

    • player1

      public Player player1
      Player model for the left side.

    • player2

      public Player player2
      Player model for the right side.

    • playerLogic1

      private PlayerLogic playerLogic1
      Input/combat logic for player 1.

    • playerLogic2

      private PlayerLogic playerLogic2
      Input/combat logic for player 2.

    • player1HealthBar

      private HealthBar player1HealthBar
      Health bar for player 1.

    • player2HealthBar

      private HealthBar player2HealthBar
      Health bar for player 2.

    • player1SkillBar

      private SkillBar player1SkillBar
      Skill cooldown bar for player 1.

    • player2SkillBar

      private SkillBar player2SkillBar
      Skill cooldown bar for player 2.

    • countdownLabel

      private javafx.scene.control.Label countdownLabel
      Center timer label in MM:SS format.

    • gameLoop

      private javafx.animation.AnimationTimer gameLoop
      Frame loop that drives gameplay simulation and HUD refresh.

    • gameOver

      private boolean gameOver
      True when match has ended and input/update should stop.

    • matchStartNanos

      private long matchStartNanos
      Timestamp of first frame, used to calculate elapsed match time.

    • projectileList

      private List<BaseProjectileAttack> projectileList
      Active projectiles currently simulated in the arena.

    • instance

      private static Scene2 instance
      Shared reference used by external systems to access the active battle scene.

  • Constructor Details

    • Scene2

      public Scene2()
      Creates and initializes the battle scene, HUD nodes, players, and input/game loop hooks.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static Scene2 getInstance()
      Returns the currently active Scene2 instance.
      Returns:
      active scene instance

    • setImageBackground

      private void setImageBackground()
      Applies the scene background image using cover-style sizing. Falls back to a default image and then a plain color if resources are missing.

    • setupControls

      private void setupControls(javafx.scene.Scene scene)
      Registers keyboard input handlers and forwards events to both player logic controllers.
      Parameters:
      scene - active JavaFX scene

    • startGameLoop

      private void startGameLoop()
      Starts the per-frame game loop.

      Each frame updates movement/combat logic, HUD values, timer countdown, game-over checks, and projectile simulation/collisions.

    • formatTime

      private String formatTime(long totalSeconds)
      Formats a second count into MM:SS.
      Parameters:
      totalSeconds - total number of seconds
      Returns:
      formatted time string

    • checkGameOver

      private void checkGameOver()
      Checks HP values and triggers game-over flow if either player reaches zero HP.

    • endGameAndShowPopup

      private void endGameAndShowPopup(int winnerPlayerNumber)
      Convenience overload that builds a winner message from player number.
      Parameters:
      winnerPlayerNumber - winner player number (1 or 2)

    • endGameAndShowPopup

      private void endGameAndShowPopup(String message)
      Stops gameplay loop and displays a centered popup with custom message.
      Parameters:
      message - text displayed in the popup

    • addProjectile

      public void addProjectile(BaseProjectileAttack p)
      Registers and renders a projectile.
      Parameters:
      p - projectile instance to add

    • removeProjectile

      public void removeProjectile(BaseProjectileAttack p)
      Removes a projectile from both simulation and scene graph.
      Parameters:
      p - projectile instance to remove

    • showFloatingText

      public void showFloatingText(Player target, int amount, javafx.scene.paint.Color color, String prefix)
      Shows a temporary floating label above a target (damage/heal indicator).
      Parameters:
      target - player whose hitbox is used as the text anchor
      amount - numeric value displayed
      color - text color
      prefix - string prefix such as "-" or "+"

    • handleGameOver

      private void handleGameOver(Player winner, Player loser)
      Handles end-of-match state transition and optional loser death animation.
      Parameters:
      winner - winning player, or null for draw/time-up
      loser - losing player, or null for draw/time-up

    • showVictoryOverlay

      private void showVictoryOverlay(Player winner)
      Builds and animates the final victory/draw overlay.
      Parameters:
      winner - winning player, or null when match ends in draw
